case_title: CHIDI NOBI VS. INSEAD NORTH AMERICA, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOBI, CHIDI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INSEAD NORTH AMERICA, INC. THE INSEAD MANAGEMENT EDUCATION FOUNDATION PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF TO SHOW LIABILITY OF DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
